'''G-40 portable cannons''' were tripod-mounted [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] produced during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They were used for the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] security.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
